results.justification: CCoT compresses CoT to dense latent representations — functionally the same as 'pendant summary tensor per step' minus the multi-axis structured encoding and top-cord consistency check, but the core compress-CoT-to-latent-summary is shared.
Information-theoretic limits on CoT compression — theoretical companion but not a mechanism.
Verifies CoT via causal attribution graph; different mechanism but similar verify-the-compressed-trace goal.
Anchors reasoning to visual cues; differs from summary-anchor token but adjacent.
Iterative summarization explicitly maintains a 'summary anchor' through CoT and checks consistency at each step — functionally close to quipu top-cord/pendant summary verification.
